title: The Adventures of Paula Peril
overview: A sexy reporter and an intrepid cameraman.  Adventures are to be had!  This is an anthology with 30 minutes of new storyline added.  The Adventures of Paula Peril merges Mystery of the Crystal Falcon, The Invisible Evil, and Midnight Whistle into one longer story.
